name: ASC30_39 FDC
reason: Official current pipeline mention was found, but route, dosage form, and current development stage were not sufficiently confirmed for entry.

name: ASC36 monotherapy
reason: Amylin-only monotherapy is outside core GLP-1 dataset scope; retained only as a component of ASC36_35 FDC.

name: ASC39 monotherapy
reason: Amylin-only monotherapy is outside core GLP-1 dataset scope; retained only as a component candidate of deferred ASC30_39 FDC.

name: ASC47 monotherapy
reason: THR-beta program is GLP-1-unrelated and excluded from current dataset scope.

name: ASC47 plus semaglutide
reason: Regimen combination with an external GLP-1 product cannot be represented cleanly as a program asset under the current contract.

name: ASC31 plus ASC47
reason: Preclinical combination relationship and asset identity cannot be modeled without inventing component relationships.
